Container.Name: Hardlink Organizer
Container.Overview: Preview-first web UI for planning and executing hardlinks across NAS storage pools. Scans ingress folders, previews destination paths before writing, validates same-device compatibility, and records full scan, link, and verification history. No files are moved or renamed.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Container Path: /config. Place config.toml here. DB and logs are also stored here by default.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Container Path: /data. Optional separate mount for DB and logs if you prefer to split config from state.

Config.Name: Source 1
Config.Description: Source mount — read-only ingress or download folder. Add a matching [source_sets] entry in config.toml.

Config.Name: Destination 1
Config.Description: Destination mount — library folder to hardlink into. Must be on the same physical device as its matching source.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID to run the container process as. Run 'id -u' on your Unraid host to find your UID.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID to run the container process as. Run 'id -g' on your Unraid host to find your GID.
